entries.term: ZooData: The data layer for AI agents
entries.product_direction: 面向 AI Agent 开发者的统一数据层，打通业务库、向量库与实时事件流
entries.suggested_headline: The Data Layer Your AI Agents Actually Need

entries.term: Clark: An AI coworker with its own cloud computer
entries.product_direction: 面向知识工作者的云端 AI 同事，自带隔离云电脑执行复杂网页与桌面任务
entries.suggested_headline: An AI Coworker With Its Own Cloud Computer

entries.term: LiveDemo: Open-source alternative to Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade
entries.product_direction: 面向 SaaS 增长团队的开源交互式产品演示平台，替代高价商业 demo 工具
entries.suggested_headline: Open-Source Interactive Demos — Without Storylane Pricing

entries.term: Mirage: Turn your SaaS into a clickable demo in 90 seconds.
entries.product_direction: 面向 PLG 团队的 AI 自动生成可点击产品演示，90 秒从 URL 到可分享 demo
entries.suggested_headline: Turn Your SaaS Into a Clickable Demo in 90 Seconds

entries.term: OpenMarkdown: A markdown editor you and your agent co-edit
entries.product_direction: 面向开发者与写作者的 Agent 协同 Markdown 编辑器，支持人机共编与版本追踪
entries.suggested_headline: Markdown Editing You and Your AI Agent Co-Author

entries.term: Acebuilder: Build landing pages with Aceternity UI
entries.product_direction: 面向独立开发者的 Aceternity UI 落地页构建器，可视化编辑+一键导出代码
entries.suggested_headline: Ship Stunning Landing Pages With Aceternity UI — No Design Skills

entries.term: Mainichi: Learn Japanese, one prefecture at a time.
entries.product_direction: 面向日语学习者的地区主题沉浸式课程，按日本都道府县递进文化与词汇
entries.suggested_headline: Learn Japanese — One Prefecture at a Time

entries.term: WX: An experimental synth for playable generative sound
entries.product_direction: 面向音乐创作者的可演奏生成式合成器，实时探索 AI 音色与 MIDI 控制
entries.suggested_headline: Play Generative Sound — An Experimental AI Synth

entries.term: DocuSmart AI: Turning fragmented knowledge into one simple system
entries.product_direction: 面向团队的 AI 知识整合平台，将分散文档自动归并成可检索的统一知识库
entries.suggested_headline: Turn Fragmented Docs Into One Searchable Knowledge System
